steps.title: Identify the causal connection
steps.content: The first sentence establishes Leda's orbital direction; the second sentence names the term for that direction. The blank must show that this terminology is a consequence of the orbital direction.

steps.title: Select the consequence transition
steps.content:
”Hence” (therefore) establishes exactly this—the term “prograde” results from Leda's orbital direction. The other three choices fail to express this cause-and-effect relationship.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
